message.content:
CAPITAL / ALT 1
(a) Asymmetrical split-screen with animated capital flow visualization
(b) Hero → Capital sources → Portfolio impact → Future vision → CTA
(c) Dark background with orange accent trails showing capital movement, dynamic data viz, bold typography hierarchy

CAPITAL / ALT 2
(a) Magazine-style editorial layout with capital as cover story
(b) Full-bleed hero → Timeline of investments → Sector breakdown → Team insights → Contact
(c) Light background with orange pull quotes, mono labels as section dividers, grid-based portfolio showcase

CAPITAL / ALT 3
(a) Minimalist 3D rotating globe with capital nodes
(b) Interactive hero → Geographic distribution → Investment thesis → Portfolio companies → CTA
(c) Dark theme with orange connection lines, hover reveals company cards, spatial navigation experience

APPROACH / ALT 1
(a) Process as subway/metro map with colored routes
(b) Hero → Methodology lines → Process stops → Case study → Principles → CTA
(c) Dark background with orange route highlights, interactive stops reveal details, unconventional navigation metaphor

APPROACH / ALT 2
(a) Collaborative workspace with process artifacts
(b) Hero → Workspace overview → Method cards → Case study board → Principles wall → CTA
(c) Light background with sticky-note aesthetic, orange accent pins, hands-on feel with textured elements

APPROACH / ALT 3
(a) Step-by-step construction visualization
(b) Hero → Blueprint reveal → Methodology build → Case study → Principles → CTA
(c) Dark theme with orange construction lines, animated assembly process, technical drawing aesthetic

INFRASTRUCTURE / ALT 1
(a) Tech stack as interconnected neural network
(b) Hero → Network overview → Core nodes → Supporting systems → Ecosystem → CTA
(c) Dark background with orange connection pulses, interactive nodes reveal details, futuristic visualization

INFRASTRUCTURE / ALT 2
(a) Infrastructure as building cross-section
(b) Hero → Foundation → Frameworks → Tools → Ecosystem → CTA
(c) Light background with orange structural highlights, cutaway view metaphor, blueprint-style annotations

INFRASTRUCTURE / ALT 3
(a) Minimalist grid with system cards that expand
(b) Hero → System overview → Expandable cards → Interconnections → Ecosystem → CTA
(c) Dark theme with orange grid lines, card-based interaction, modular design approach
